rationale: Coinglass's free public pages previously displayed funding rates and OI summaries, but as of 2024–2025 granular per-asset funding rate history, real-time OI breakdowns, and correlation matrices require a paid API or account login; FRED and alternative.me do not carry NEAR derivatives data; CoinGecko free tier provides price/volume but not funding rates or correlations.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/currencies/NEAR — funding rate & OI page exists but live/historical data gated behind login/paid tier
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/near — price & market cap only, no derivatives or correlation data on free tier
https://defillama.com/protocol/near — TVL data only, no derivatives metrics
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no per-asset correlation
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — macro data only, NEAR not listed
